overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking steadily along a rural dirt road beside railroad tracks. The scene features overcast stormy skies, tall prairie grass, and wooden telephone poles lining the path through open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road parallel to railway tracks through prairie grassland

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt road carrying a dark bag, wearing a long coat and hat that sway with the movement

entered.detail: unpaved rural road with visible tire tracks and patches of grass
parallel metal railway tracks with wooden ties running alongside the road
wooden utility poles with crossbars and multiple wires lining the right side of the tracks
tall dry yellow-brown grass fields extending across the open landscape
scattered trees and low hills visible on the horizon beneath the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a rural dirt road that runs parallel to railroad tracks, surrounded by tall prairie grass under an overcast sky. Wooden telephone poles with overhead wires recede into the distance on the right, while open grassland stretches to the horizon. The atmosphere is desolate and moody, with no other people or vehicles in sight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate rural path that maintains a moody, isolated atmosphere. It begins by tracking a character walking steadily along a dirt road that runs parallel to a set of railroad tracks. As the camera moves forward, the view expands to reveal tall prairie grass swaying under a heavy, overcast sky. The scene then emphasizes the linear perspective of wooden telephone poles and overhead wires receding into the distance on the right. Finally, the perspective opens further to show the vast, empty grassland stretching toward a distant, lonely horizon.
